Primetime Emmy Awards Writer's Guild of America, USA Casting Society of America, USA The First Olympics: Athens 1896 The First Olympics: Athens 1896 is a 1984 US TV miniseries produced by Columbia Pictures Television for broadcast by the NBC network. This television miniseries tells the story of the founding of the modern Olympics by focusing on individuals in several countries and their preparations and eventual competition in Athens in 1896.
